channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists found the “holy grail” gene that could one day help humans regrow limbs
item.description: Scientists studying axolotls, zebrafish, and mice have uncovered a shared set of genes that may one day help humans regrow lost limbs. By identifying ...

item.title: A common constipation drug shows surprising power to protect kidneys
item.description: A common constipation drug may have unexpectedly unlocked a new way to slow chronic kidney disease — a condition that affects millions and often leads...

item.title: New obesity discovery rewrites decades of fat science
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a surprising secret hidden inside fat cells that could reshape how we think about obesity and metabolic disease. A protein c...

item.title: Scientists discover a new way to prevent gum disease without killing good bacteria
item.description: Scientists have uncovered a surprising way to influence the bacteria living in our mouths — not by killing them, but by interrupting how they “talk” t...
